spatial.note: Presence/effort occupancy field: incident locations (y=1) versus effort-proportional background (y=0), an RBF basis evaluated at seasonally-drifted coordinates lat'=lat-A_lat*sin(2pi(doy-phi)/365), PLUS a regularized log-depth covariate b_d1*z + b_d2*z2 (z=standardize(log10 max(depth_m,1)); peaked shelf/slope preference, b_d2<0). Both the RBF term (col_means) and the depth term (z_bg_mean, z2_bg_mean) are centered on the background, and the per-draw Z normalizes the COMBINED predictor to mean 1 over the sailed background, so relative risk is bounded.
